rulings.Case Title: JOE ELDRIDGE III et al VS. UNITED PARCEL SERVICE INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions;Index; Non California Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 29, 2010, line 6, DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE INC.'S Motion For Sanctions. MOTION DENIED ON GROUND PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARE NOT WARRANTED BY EXISTING LAW. PLAINTIFF'S INTERPRETATION OF VC SECTION 22500 IS OBJECTIVELY REASONABLE. MOTION DENIED ON GROUND THAT COMPLAINT WAS FILED FOR AN IMPROPER PURPOSE. DEFENDANT FAILS TO ESTABLISH THAT THE COMPLAINT WAS FILED FOR THE PRIMARY PURPOSE OF HARASSING DEFENDANT. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: NARCISO S HILO III VS. FIRST FINANCIAL LENDER et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 29, 2010, line 8, DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., CITIBANK, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR CERTIFICATEHOLDERS, BEAR STEARNS ALT-A TRUST, MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH, EMC MORTGAGE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: YOLANDA MIANI, ET AL VS. LABIB MAJID BARANCE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 29, 2010, line 9, DEFENDANTS LONE OAK FUND, LLC, A CORPORATION, ABBASI, A.S. TRUSTEE, CARDIOVASCULAR ASSOCIATES DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO 5TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE WHAT THEY ARE ENTITLED TO RECEIVE AS RESTITUTION FROM THE DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE A FIDUCIARY OR OTHER CIRCUMSTANCES APPROPRIATE TO THE REMEDY OF AN ACCOUNTING AND A BALANCE DUE FROM THESE DEFENDANTS THAT CAN ONLY BE ASCERTAINED BY AN ACCOUNTING. PLAINTIFFS TO ALLEGE WHAT MONIES WERE OWED BY THESE DEFENDANTS SPECIFICALLY TO PLAINTIFFS OR WHAT MONIES THESE DEFENDANTS RECEIVED THAT WERE PAYABLE TO PLAINTIFFS. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT F. RICHARD II VS. ROBERT F. RICHARD et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, July 29, 2010, line 11, DEFENDANT FRED RICHARD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD HOW THE DECLARATORY RELIEF WOULD IMPACT DEFENDANT, AND THAT DEFENDANT HAS AN INTEREST IN THE DOCUMENTS PLAINTIFF SEEKS TO CANCEL. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WHAT DEFENDANT WOULD BE ENJOINED FROM. NO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CIVIL CONSPIRACY MAY BE PLED WITHOUT COURT ORDER CC SECTION 1714.10. FRAUD MUST BE PLED WITH PARTICULARITY. PLAINTIFF MUST DEMONSTRATE ON THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT THAT HIS CAUSES OF ACTION ARE NOT TIME-BARRED. =(302/CWW)
